gaps: sha256 baseline differs across consecutive fetches due to dynamic markup. Spec-defined fallback used: simpleprocess-mirror project's most recent deployment is 2026-02-05, predating spec freeze (2026-04-27).

acceptance_criteria.text: README documents full deploy + email runbook
.env.example lists 5 required keys (placeholders only)
Repo state clean — no committed secrets, .env gitignored, GitHub remote canonical

known_gaps: Phase B (AC8-AC17) intentionally deferred. Zoho Mail Free onboarding and Telegram bot recovery are user-blocking actions.
Initial dirty deploy briefly exposed .env via Pages preview URL; mitigated by clean redeploy + dirty-deployment delete + Cloudflare API token rotation by user.

package.json `npm run deploy` script (`wrangler pages deploy .`) would re-introduce the leak. Should be updated to deploy from a clean dist directory; tracked in README. Not changed in Phase A to keep the diff scoped to spec deliverables.
